text.title: Agent On-Call Runbook Template Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable signals to a rule from 01-core-rules.xml. Every leaf either applies a concrete rule or routes to `skip-this-methodology`.

decision-tree.root-question: Is the incident class well-defined with stable signals?

branch.question: Does mutation require tier-2 approval flow?

conclusion.verdict: author runbook with read-only default + tier-2 gates

example.trace: input matches `class_defined == true` → sub-question → `approval_flow == true` → conclusion ref=`readonly-default`.
